strategy_name: MACD crossover portfolio — cross-strategy correlation gate and portfolio construction
strategy_description: TASK-0055: Evaluate pairwise correlation among 4 MACD bootstrap survivors (SBIN, BAJFINANCE, TITAN, ICICIBANK). Apply correlation gate (full-period r < 0.7, stress-period r < 0.6). Determine which instruments coexist in the portfolio. Define capital allocation using SizingVolatilityTarget at ~10% annualized vol on ₹3 lakh total capital. Record portfolio composition and sizing rule in decisions/algorithm/.

marcus.summary: GO verdict. The correlation gate applies unchanged to same-strategy/different-instrument pairs. Banking cluster (SBIN, ICICIBANK, BAJFINANCE) is structurally correlated — SBIN/ICICIBANK expected to fail both full-period (r > 0.7) and COVID stress-period (r > 0.6) gates. DSR tiebreaker favors SBIN (0.7042) over ICICIBANK (0.3816) and BAJFINANCE (0.6120). TITAN is structurally uncorrelated with banking names. Expected final portfolio: SBIN + TITAN at ₹1.5 lakh each, vol-targeting at 10% annualized. Kill-switch thresholds derived from bootstrap p5 and in-sample MaxDD/MaxDDDuration. Regime gate must be computed before finalizing weights.
decision_marks: **Decision (2026-04.1.0) — algorithm: experimental** scope: portfolio-construction, MACD-crossover, TASK-0055 — Banking cluster (SBIN, BAJFINANCE, ICICIBANK) treated as correlated instruments. Expected outcome: SBIN/ICICIBANK fails full-period and stress-period correlation gates; SBIN/BAJFINANCE borderline. DSR tiebreaker retains SBIN. Expected final portfolio: SBIN + TITAN.

**Decision (2026-04.1.0) — algorithm: experimental** scope: portfolio-sizing, MACD-crossover, TASK-0055 — For 2-instrument portfolio (SBIN + TITAN), ₹1.5 lakh notional per instrument. Vol-targeting (SizingVolatilityTarget, 20-bar, no leverage) at 10% annualized vol target. SBIN kill-switch: Sharpe p5=0.0719, max DD threshold=4.10% (1.5×2.73%), max DD duration=448 days (2×224 days). TITAN kill-switch: p5=0.0854, max DD threshold=4.72% (1.5×3.1454%), max DD duration=1388 days (2×694 days).

**Decision (2026-04.1.0) — algorithm: experimental** scope: regime-gate-application, TASK-0055 — Regime gate computation is a blocking step before finalizing capital weights. Per-regime backtests (pre-COVID 2018-2020, COVID+recovery 2020-2021, post-recovery 2021-2024) required for all surviving instruments. If any instrument shows single-regime abs(Sharpe) contribution >= 70%, apply half-weight in final allocation.

killed_strategies.name: sma-crossover (fast=20/slow=50)
killed_strategies.failure_mode: universe gate — zero sufficient instruments (2-3 trades/year)
